title: AI Corporate Headshot
description: Transforms a casual photo into a professional business portrait for LinkedIn.
positive_prompt: Transform the input photo into a professional corporate business headshot portrait suitable for LinkedIn. Preserve the face identity, recognizable features, expression, and eye direction of the person. Put them in clean, well-fitting professional business attire (such as a tailored suit or elegant blazer). Set the background to a modern corporate office interior or a professional studio backdrop with soft, elegant bokeh blur. Apply clean, professional studio lighting with realistic textures. Rendering contract: Use the input image as visual ground truth. Keep the exact number of subjects and their left-to-right order, relative scale, pose, gaze, interaction, and key props. For every visible person, retain recognizable face geometry, age range, skin tone, hairstyle, and distinguishing features in a style-appropriate form; do not beautify, age, or swap identity unless explicitly requested. Preserve the source aspect ratio, camera viewpoint, and all important content inside the frame unless this effect explicitly calls for a different layout. Apply the transformation consistently to the subjects, clothing, props, and environment. Return one coherent finished image, not a before-and-after comparison, split screen, or unintended collage; use multiple frames or a decorative border only when this effect explicitly requests them. Include no readable text, letters, numerals, logos, signatures, watermarks, or interface elements unless explicitly requested.
negative_prompt: text, captions, logos, watermarks, signatures, casual clothing, t-shirt, messy hair, outdoors, beach, parties, cartoon, illustration, distorted face, malformed hands, bad anatomy, low quality, blurry, identity drift, face swap, altered age, altered skin tone, wrong subject count, extra people, missing people, duplicated subject, merged subjects, inconsistent transformation, partial transformation, before-and-after, split screen, unintended collage, accidental crop, cut-off face, malformed anatomy, broken hands, fused fingers, extra fingers, extra limbs, incoherent perspective, floating objects, random text, gibberish letters, numerals, logo, watermark, signature, interface elements
custom_prompt_placeholder: e.g. gray studio backdrop, dark blue suit...
